languages.original_text: "Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"

languages.text: "Может быть мой подход в корне неверен или эти объекты не функциональны. А может быть они просто не хотят, чтобы кто-либо выведал их тайны? Загадка! До чего же стимулирующая загадка!"
"Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"
languages.original_text: "Может быть мой подход в корне неверен или эти объекты не функциональны. А может быть они просто не хотят, чтобы кто-либо выведал их тайны? Загадка! До чего же стимулирующая загадка!"

traits.locale_text: "Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"
"Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"
"Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"

languages.text: «Es posible que mis métodos presenten un error fundamental o que los objetos no sean funcionales. Quizá no quieran que nadie descubra sus secretos. ¡Es un misterio! ¡Un misterio emocionante!».
languages.original_text: "Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"

traits.locale_text: «Es posible que mis métodos presenten un error fundamental o que los objetos no sean funcionales. Quizá no quieran que nadie descubra sus secretos. ¡Es un misterio! ¡Un misterio emocionante!».

languages.text: “也许我的方法在根本上存在缺陷，也或许这些物体根本就无法运作，又或者，它们只是不想让别人揭开它们的秘密？这就是谜题！一个令人兴奋的谜题！”
languages.original_text: "Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"

traits.locale_text: “也许我的方法在根本上存在缺陷，也或许这些物体根本就无法运作，又或者，它们只是不想让别人揭开它们的秘密？这就是谜题！一个令人兴奋的谜题！”

languages.text: « Soit mon approche n'est pas la bonne, soit ces objets n'ont pas de fonction particulière. À moins qu'ils refusent que quiconque ne découvre leurs secrets ? C'est un mystère ! Un mystère exaltant ! »
languages.original_text: "Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"

traits.locale_text: « Soit mon approche n'est pas la bonne, soit ces objets n'ont pas de fonction particulière. À moins qu'ils refusent que quiconque ne découvre leurs secrets ? C'est un mystère ! Un mystère exaltant ! »

languages.text: "Vielleicht ist mein Ansatz von Grund auf fehlerbehaftet ... oder die Objekte sind nichtfunktional. Oder sie wollen einfach nicht, dass jemand ihre Geheimnisse aufspürt? Ein Mysterium! Ein stimulierendes Mysterium!"
languages.original_text: "Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"

traits.locale_text: "Vielleicht ist mein Ansatz von Grund auf fehlerbehaftet ... oder die Objekte sind nichtfunktional. Oder sie wollen einfach nicht, dass jemand ihre Geheimnisse aufspürt? Ein Mysterium! Ein stimulierendes Mysterium!"

languages.text: 「私のやり方には根本的な欠陥があるのかもしれない。それとも、単に秘密を暴かれたくないだけなのだろうか？謎だ！刺激的な謎だ！」
languages.original_text: "Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"

traits.locale_text: 「私のやり方には根本的な欠陥があるのかもしれない。それとも、単に秘密を暴かれたくないだけなのだろうか？謎だ！刺激的な謎だ！」

languages.text: "Belki yaklaşımım temelden kusurludur veya nesneler işlevsel değildir. Belki de sırlarını kimsenin öğrenmesini istemiyorlardır... Bu bir gizem! Uyarıcı bir gizem!"
languages.original_text: "Perhaps my approach is fundamentally flawed or the objects are non-functional. Or perhaps they simply do not want anyone to root out their secrets? It's a mystery! A stimulating mystery!"

traits.locale_text: "Belki yaklaşımım temelden kusurludur veya nesneler işlevsel değildir. Belki de sırlarını kimsenin öğrenmesini istemiyorlardır... Bu bir gizem! Uyarıcı bir gizem!"
